stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true in respect to the range of an NDB?

options.a: At night the usable range of an NDB is reduced when interaction occurs between the ground wave and the sky wave.
options.b: At night the maximum range of an NDB is smaller due to the sky wave.
options.c: At night the usable range of an NDB is reduced because the propagation of the ground wave is better in day time then at night.
options.d: There is no difference in range of an NDB between day and night.
